mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, mechanically expanding equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in the labor market exceeding a 0.3 percentage point monthly increase in the unemployment rate signals impending recession risk, triggering earnings downgrades and negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment threshold breach.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in housing starts and industrial production indicates synchronized demand expansion across durable and non-durable sectors, reinforcing corporate revenue visibility and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict returns with a directional accuracy exceeding 55% over a 5-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: Within a monetary tightening cycle, persistent CPIAUCSL readings above the 2.5% annualized threshold force prolonged high discount rates, compressing equity multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive or neutral in > 50% of observations where both CPI and funds rate exceed their respective thresholds.

mechanism_narrative: Rising RSAFS consumer credit balances reflect accelerating household spending momentum, which translates directly into near-term corporate revenue beats and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below 0.02 over any 1-year rolling window, or credit growth decouples from equity returns for two consecutive quarters.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained drop in INDPRO below the 100 baseline index signals structural supply contraction and weakening manufacturing demand, leading to margin compression and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are not statistically lower than the unconditional mean when INDPRO breaches the 100 threshold (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between slowing PAYEMS payroll growth and a rising UNRATE indicates labor market cooling, reducing aggregate consumer spending power and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The interaction term fails to improve predictive R-squared by at least 1.5% over a single-series baseline model in a 3-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: During late-cycle expansions, decelerating GDPC1 growth combined with peaking HOUST activity signals impending demand exhaustion, triggering earnings revisions downward and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in > 60% of late-cycle observations where GDP growth decelerates below 2.0% annualized and housing starts decline for two consecutive months.
